top_signals.title: US Gov asks Anthropic to ban 'foreign national' access to Fable, Mythos
top_signals.summary: The US government has ordered Anthropic to block all foreign nationals from accessing Fable 5 and Mythos 5, forcing the company to suspend both models worldwide. Anthropic is complying but disputes the basis, calling the cited jailbreak narrow and the capability widely available elsewhere. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
